creator: henrik@cheat-project.com
text:
As of the new xorg-server update on 01 Apr 2008 my mouse wheel doesn't work anymore for scrolling. However, clicking it does work.
I have not changed my configuration. I use ZAxisMapping 4 5, the mouse device I use is psm0. I do not use the mouse daemon, if that helps. Protocol is set to Auto.
I assume that this problem occurs because of the new patch applied to xorg-server.
